code: rep_<doi-slug>/   DESCRIPTION   replication.yml              # full metadata + replications list   inst/replication.yml         # copy for installed package   R/     make_figure_*.R             # analysis     make_table_*.R     format_*.R                  # display formatting     replication_api.R           # orchestration API (below)   inst/replication_code/        # synced copies for Code tab / get_code()   inst/report/artifacts/        # baked Display outputs (build_report())   data/                         # analysis datasets (LazyData)

title: Package replication checklist
text: Paper metadata paper.doi — full DOI URL paper.title paper.package — must match DESCRIPTION Package: field paper.package_repo top-level repo — GitHub slug (org/repo) paper.package_ref — branch/tag (default main) paper.package_folder — optional; sibling folder name monorepo dev figure table Rules: id — short slug used Shiny run_replication() type — figure table make — exported function returning analysis output (ggplot data.frame / kableExtra) format — exported function returning display-ready output (ggplot HTML string) data — package dataset name(s), file paths
code: replications:   - id: fig_1     type: figure     make: make_figure_1     format: format_figure_1     data: my_dataset   - id: tab_1     type: table     make: make_table_1     format: format_table_1     data: my_dataset

title: replicateEverything
text: Tools discover, run, contribute computational replications empirical research papers. replicateEverything connects public replication registry, retrieves replication materials (metadata, processed data, analysis code), reproduces figures tables published studies standardized workflow. package also bundles Shiny demo app browsing studies running replications interactively — try live demo.

title: replicateEverything
text: Discovery — search registry, look papers DOI, inspect available replications One-line replication — run single figure table, reproduce entire paper replicate_paper() Registry-backed materials — fetch data code GitHub without manual downloads Folder-backed studies — dedicated study repositories code/, data/, artifacts/ Package-backed studies — standalone R packages linked lightweight registry stubs Artifacts — load, validate, save precomputed outputs (PNG, HTML, RDS) fast display Display pipeline — optional format_* steps turn analysis objects HTML tables ggplot figures Shiny demo — live app; run_shiny_app() locally; save_local_shiny() deploy Shiny Server Contributor tooling — scaffold new replication folder create_replication_template()

text: Studies maintained simple Git repository (code/, data/, artifacts/) can linked registry. Keep stub papers/<folder>.yml : full replications: list lives study repo’s replication.yml. Display artifacts live artifacts/ (build_study_artifacts()). study repository root: See vignette("folder-replication-checklist", package = "replicateEverything") full workflow.
code: paper:   doi: https://doi.org/10.1177/00491241211036161   title: Bounding Causes of Effects With Mediators   materials: folder   study_repo: replicate-anything/rep-10.1177-00491241211036161   study_folder: rep-10.1177-00491241211036161   study_ref: main repo: replicate-anything/rep-10.1177-00491241211036161 library(replicateEverything)  options(   replicateEverything.registry_root = "../registry",   replicateEverything.use_sibling_packages = TRUE )  # 1. Build artifacts/manifest.json build_study_artifacts(location = ".", install_deps = TRUE)  # 2. Run tests testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat")  # 3. Check + write registry/replication.yml and registry/index.csv prepare_folder_paper(".", build_artifacts = FALSE, registry_root = "../registry")  # 4. Sync stub files into registry checkout (or copy manually) sync_folder_paper(".", registry_root = "../registry")  # One-step alternative when registry is local: # add_folder_paper(".", registry_root = "../registry")

title: replicateEverything
text: Studies maintained standalone R packages can linked registry. Keep stub file papers/<folder>.yml points package (materials registry): replicateEverything merges full replications: list study package replication.yml registry stub omits . Display artifacts live study package inst/report/artifacts/ (build_report()). Validate register package-backed study: See vignette("package-replication-checklist", package = "replicateEverything") requirements. Local development (monorepo): place study package sibling folder next registry/. Enable sibling resolution : Published packages: set package_repo (top-level repo) GitHub slug. package installs via remotes::install_github() local sibling found. Optional overrides: paper.package_path — absolute relative path package root options(replicateEverything.replication_packages = list(pkgname = "/path")) Linked study packages export: list_replications(), replication_meta(), run_replication(id), load_artifact(id), artifact_file(id), get_code(id), build_report().
code: paper:   doi: https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0278337   title: "Public support for global vaccine sharing in the COVID-19 pandemic"   package: rep1371journalpone0278337   package_folder: rep-10.1371_journal.pone.0278337   package_repo: replicate-anything/rep-10.1371_journal.pone.0278337   package_ref: main repo: replicate-anything/rep-10.1371_journal.pone.0278337 options(replicateEverything.registry_root = "/path/to/registry")  check_package_replication("/path/to/rep_package") add_paper("/path/to/rep_package", full_replication = FALSE) options(replicateEverything.use_sibling_packages = TRUE) options(replicateEverything.replication_packages_root = "/path/to/monorepo")

text: replicateEverything package provides tools discovering executing computational replications empirical research papers. connects public replication registry containing metadata, replication scripts, processed datasets required reproduce figures tables published studies.

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: typical workflow using package : Retrieve metadata paper using get_doi_metadata(). Search replication registry using search_papers(). Create template contributing replication using create_replication_template(). Inspect available replications using list_replications(). Run single replication using run_replication(). Reproduce results paper using replicate_paper(). Launch bundled Shiny demo run_shiny_app(), deploy save_local_shiny().

title: replicateEverything 0.3.0
text: build_study_artifacts() — run replications write artifacts/ + manifest.json study repo. check_folder_replication() — pre-merge checklist (layout, yaml, code/data paths, artifacts, tests). prepare_folder_paper() — build artifacts, validate, write registry/replication.yml + registry/index.csv study repo. sync_folder_paper() — copy prepared stub files registry checkout. add_folder_paper() — validate register folder-backed study stub registry. Vignette: “Folder replication checklist”. Improved artifact error hints folder-backed studies.

title: replicateEverything 0.2.0
text: Connect public replication registry discover run computational replications DOI. Run single figure table run_replication() / render_replication(), reproduce entire paper replicate_paper(). Load, validate, save precomputed artifacts (load_artifact(), save_artifact(), validate_artifact()). Optional display pipeline via registered format_* functions (format_for_display(), render_for_display()). Package-backed replications: install call standalone study packages registry local monorepo. Contributor tooling: create_replication_template() scaffolds new replication folder replication.yml, data, code stubs. Registry search metadata helpers: search_papers(), load_index(), get_doi_metadata(), list_replications(), get_code(). Local registry development via options(replicateEverything.registry_root = ...) options(replicateEverything.index = ...).
